blocks.text: Hovland one shot off the lead — Hilton Head goes Scandinavian

Bayern's 4-3 demolition of Real Madrid was last night's Champions League spectacle. Liverpool's 0-2 loss to PSG leaves their European season on life support — and Arsenal's title lead suddenly looks even more comfortable.
🎮 IEM Rio 2026 — rain chasing CS2 Major glory, ongoing
🏎️ Sun 17:00 — Bahrain Grand Prix 2026, round 4 of the championship
